claims.statement: PRECEDENT (BASE RATE): Aramark's ~$1.0bn acquisition of uniform/linen rental peer AmeriPride Services received HSR early termination (Transaction No. 20180159, granted December 22, 2017) — i.e., it cleared WITHOUT a second request — per the FTC's Early Termination Notices.
claims.quote: Date December 22, 2017 Transaction Number 20180159 Acquiring Party Aramark Acquired Party AmeriPride Services Inc.

claims.statement: Cintas disclosed an earlier rebuffed approach: it first delivered an indication of interest to acquire UniFirst for $255 per share on February 7, 2022 (a 43% premium to that day's close), and UniFirst rejected the $275/share proposal on November 27, 2024 and again on December 9, 2024 without further engagement.
claims.quote: Cintas initially approached UniFirst and delivered an indication of interest to acquire UniFirst for $255 per share (the “Prior Proposal”) on February 7, 2022, an offer that represented a 43% premium to UniFirst’s closing price on that date.
claims.locator: Press release dated January 7, 2025, Engagement History

claims.statement: Cintas's January 7, 2025 unsolicited proposal to acquire UniFirst for $275.00 per share in cash implied a total value of approximately $5.3 billion and a 46% premium to UniFirst's ninety-day average closing price as of January 6, 2025; the proposal had first been delivered to UniFirst's board on November 8, 2024.
claims.quote: The Proposal implies a total value for UniFirst of approximately $5.3 billion and offers UniFirst shareholders a 46% premium to UniFirst’s ninety-day average closing price as of January 6, 2025.
claims.locator: Press release dated January 7, 2025, deal terms

claims.statement: Under the March 2026 definitive agreement, UniFirst shareholders will receive $155.00 in cash and 0.7720 shares of Cintas stock per UniFirst share — a combined $310.00 per share based on Cintas's $200.77 close on March 9, 2026 — implying a total enterprise value of approximately $5.5 billion, a multiple of 8.0x run-rate trailing-12-month EBITDA including approximately $375 million of operating cost synergies.
claims.quote: The implied total enterprise value of the transaction is approximately $5.5 billion, which represents a multiple of 8.0x run-rate trailing 12 months EBITDA, including approximately $375 million of operating cost synergies.
claims.locator: 8-K Ex-99.1 joint press release — Transaction Details

claims.statement: The fixed exchange ratio implies approximately 14,261,683 Cintas shares issued as stock consideration, leaving former UniFirst shareholders with approximately 3.4% of fully diluted Cintas common stock (as of April 16, 2026).
claims.quote: the estimated number of shares of Cintas common stock issuable as the stock consideration is approximately 14,261,683 shares, which will result in former UniFirst shareholders holding approximately 3.4% of the outstanding fully diluted Cintas common stock based on the number of outstanding shares of common stock and outstanding long-term incentive awards of Cintas and UniFirst as of April 16, 2026, the most recent practicable date for which such information was available.
claims.locator: Letter to shareholders / Q&A, stock-consideration discussion (p. 1)

claims.statement: Per the S-4, current Cintas shareholders and UniFirst shareholders are expected to hold approximately 96.6% and 3.4%, respectively, of the outstanding Cintas common stock immediately following completion of the mergers.
claims.quote: current Cintas shareholders and UniFirst shareholders are expected to hold approximately 96.6% and 3.4%, respectively, of the outstanding shares of Cintas common stock immediately following completion of the mergers.

claims.statement: Cintas's obligation to complete the mergers is not conditioned on its obtaining financing for the mergers (no financing condition).
claims.quote: Financing of the Mergers Cintas’ obligation to complete the mergers is not conditioned upon its obtaining financing for the mergers.

claims.statement: Cintas stated it has secured fully committed bridge financing from Morgan Stanley Senior Funding, Inc., KeyBank National Association and Wells Fargo Bank N.A.
claims.quote: Cintas has secured fully committed bridge financing from Morgan Stanley Senior Funding, Inc., KeyBank National Association and Wells Fargo Bank N.A.
claims.locator: 8-K Ex-99.1 Joint Press Release, dated Mar 11, 2026 (Transaction Details)

claims.statement: Cintas asserts the net leverage ratio at close of the UniFirst acquisition is expected to be 1.5x debt to EBITDA.
claims.quote: Net leverage ratio at close is expected to be 1.5x debt to EBITDA.
claims.locator: 8-K Ex-99.1 Joint Press Release, dated Mar 11, 2026 (Compelling Financial Profile)

claims.statement: The mergers are conditioned on the expiration or termination of any waiting period (and any extension thereof) under the HSR Act.
claims.quote: Regulatory Matters US Antitrust The mergers are conditioned upon the expiration or termination of any waiting period (and any extension thereof) under the HSR Act.
